runTitle: Vercel Production Targeted QA - Artifact Guardrails v8.11.81
coveredSurfaces: /api/health: production health check returned healthy database/cache/ai
/api/ai/incident-report: GET returns 405, matching POST-only route contract
/dashboard: AI sidebar opens and AI Engine Ready is visible
AI sidebar guidance query: '추세 분석 기능 설명해줘' returned a normal guidance response, not an intelligent-monitoring artifact execution
AI sidebar artifact query: '장애 보고서 작성해줘' called /api/ai/incident-report once and rendered Incident Report artifact card with MD/TXT downloads
AI sidebar input guard: send button is disabled when the input is empty after submit
skippedSurfaces: Monitoring Analysis artifact execution: not re-run to keep this QA focused on the changed intent guard and incident artifact path
Abort/stop in-flight artifact: not directly observed because the production incident-report response completed in about 1891ms
Modal/detail pack: unchanged by the artifact guardrail release
Security prompt-injection pack: outside this targeted release validation
Cloud Run admin observability /monitoring and /monitoring/traces: not part of Vercel AI artifact UI guardrail scope

expertAssessments.rationale: Changed AI artifact intent paths were verified on production with one guidance query and one artifact generation query.
Unit/contract gates were already green before release; this run adds browser-level Playwright MCP coverage for the changed production surface.
GitLab tag pipeline, Vercel deployment, post-deploy smoke, and production version evidence all point to the same v8.11.81 release.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period returned no charge records yet; previous-month probe confirmed CLI connectivity and billed 0.0000 USD.

completedImprovements.title: Artifact guidance requests should not trigger monitoring artifact execution
completedImprovements.evidence: Production Playwright MCP: '추세 분석 기능 설명해줘' returned guidance text and no /api/ai/intelligent-monitoring resource was observed.

completedImprovements.title: Incident report artifact renders from production AI sidebar
completedImprovements.evidence: Production Playwright MCP: '장애 보고서 작성해줘' called /api/ai/incident-report and rendered an Incident Report card with MD/TXT downloads.

completedImprovements.title: AI sidebar send button disables when input is empty after artifact submission
completedImprovements.evidence: Production Playwright MCP observed message send disabled after submit cleared the input.

notes: Preview deployment was created first, but Vercel Deployment Protection blocked browser MCP access; production tag release v8.11.81 was used for final Playwright MCP verification.
Incident-report artifact response completed quickly, so abort/stop behavior remains covered by local unit tests rather than production browser timing.
